title: Nephrodium setigerum

intro: Nephrodium setigerum, also known as Setigerm fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Nephrolepidaceae family. The Setigerm fern has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Nephrodium setigerum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
